{{CargoRelic
|name=Of Human Bondage
|class_id=21334
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Maugham’s autobiographical scalpel. An orphan’s journey through religion, medicine, and flawed love to existential freedom.
|fame=71
|art=69
|fth=62
|civ=109
|tech=51
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Demon Minion RUSH +3%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +15<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Demon Minion RUSH +4%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +20<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Demon Minion RUSH +5%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +25<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Demon Minion RUSH +7%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +35<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Demon Minion RUSH +9%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +45<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Demon Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +60<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Demon Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per Demon Form Tier, Snail ATK +60<br>Demon Form Tiers: 9/9<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill III.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT +9%
|skill2=[[File:Dungbeetle skill III.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Earth RES +60
|skill3=[[File:Dungbeetle skill III.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, Troop DMG toward heroes +6%
}}
